# Pull Request

## Summary

One paragraph: what does this change and why.

## Type

- [ ] Fix (typo, broken link, factual correction)
- [ ] New stack component
- [ ] New workflow
- [ ] New case study
- [ ] Installer / tooling improvement
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Translation
- [ ] Other

## Checklist

- [ ] PR is focused on one change
- [ ] Markdown lints clean
- [ ] No real secrets, real product URLs, or PII added
- [ ] If adding a new component: `credits/README.md` updated
- [ ] If changing the installer: `--dry-run` was tested
- [ ] If editing a case study: still anonymized at the URL level
- [ ] If adding new prose: read it out loud, trimmed marketing fluff

## Related issues

Closes #...

## Notes for reviewer

Anything specific to flag for the maintainer.
